added: ICMP ping monitoring for all configured devices — up/down status updates every 60 seconds
SSH config backup for Cisco IOS, Aruba, and generic SSH-capable devices
Agent heartbeat with CPU, RAM, and temperature metrics (Raspberry Pi temperature supported)
Automatic device list sync — agent fetches devices from the cloud, no manual re-entry needed after migration
Multi-group device organisation with CSV bulk import (up to 500 devices)
Alert history stored in the cloud — survives agent restarts and hardware changes
Docker image published to Docker Hub for Raspberry Pi arm64 and x86 amd64 platforms
Automated Docker image builds via GitHub Actions on every agent code change
Read-only share link — generate a view-only URL for teammates without a dashboard login
